name: recipes-scale
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.ingredients.every(i => i.qty === null || Number.isFinite(i.qty))
_note: cooking.recipes-scale scales a STORED recipe's ingredient quantities by targetServings/servings. Fail-CLOSED on poisoned numerics: a non-finite or absurd targetServings is clamped to [1,10000] (falling back to the recipe's own servings when non-finite) so it can NEVER mint Infinity/NaN quantities — qty is always finite or null. Rejects an unknown/missing recipe id (ok:false). State-backed (per-user, in STATE.cookingLens); with no STATE returns ok:false 'STATE unavailable' (degrade-graceful). Path-3 LENS_ACTIONS macro — fuzz cases here all resolve to ok:false because the assassin has no seeded recipe; real positive-path scaling math is pinned in server/tests/cooking-lens-macros.test.js.
